description: CompositionPink hooded sweatshirt made of 80% cotton and 20% polyester, has a hood with drawstrings and velvet inner lining, full sleeves, ribbed cuffs and hem, brand name across the chest in metallic embellishments, and pockets on the waistFittingComfortWash careWash below 40 degrees separatelyDo not dry cleanDo not soak, bleach or tumble dryDry in shadeWarm iron; do not iron on decoartionsPerfect for your sporty fashion needs, this hooded sweatshirt from adidas is designed to keep you warm and comfortable during your training sessions and lazy walks in the winter chill. Team it with adidas track pants and sports shoes for a sporty look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in sweatshirtsHeight: 5'8"; Chest: 32"
